subject: Joint Distributions
question: A device contains two circuits. The second circuit is a backup for the first, so the second is used only when the first has failed. The device fails when and only when the second circuit fails. Let $X$ and $Y$ be the times at which the first and second circuits fail, respectively. $X$ and $Y$ have joint probability density function $f_{XY}(x, y) = \begin{cases} 6e^{-x} e^{-2y} & 0 < x < y < \infty \\ 0 & \text{otherwise.} \end{cases}$ What is the expected time at which the device fails?
